notes: 3.11.03 — MODULE NHAN SU theo muc dich Sep chot (theo doi CHAM CONG -> TINH LUONG): (1) FIX PHAN QUYEN: NV nhom chuc nang HR khong thay menu Nhan su du hrmCanSeeAll cap du quyen ben trong (2 cong lech chuan) — canAccessTab('hrm') nay tai dung hrmCanSeeAll lam nguon su that duy nhat; tick tay tab hrm van giu, khong ai mat quyen. (2) DASHBOARD HRM MOI truc cham cong-luong theo KY (thanh chon ky ‹›, mac dinh thang hien tai): card Tong nhan su (dang lam) phan loai Van phong · Thuyen vien · O&M; card Cham cong ky CHI theo doi bang da IMPORT (khong cham tai app — import PDF thiet ke rieng sau khi co file mau); card Ky luong trang thai theo profile; card Thue TNCN ky + nut CHI TIET (modal per-NV: gross/thue/trang thai + DOI CHIEU khau tru bang luong vs pitAmount tren AP luong cung ky, lech thi canh bao do); card BHXH ky (NV+Cty) + nut CHI TIET (modal per-NV NV dong/Cty dong/Tong). R12: tong tien chi cong profile VND (office/crew/tech), loai USD. '📌 Hom nay' = viec pipeline (bang cong thieu, cham cong tau cho duyet, ky luong dang xu ly) bam nhay thang view; alerts ho so (HD/chung chi/CCCD) giu cuoi trang. NV thuong: dashboard toi gian, khong khoi luong. Moi ham CHI DOC du lieu. Verify: node --check PASS + test ham that 16/16 (agg per ky, loc VND, shift ky qua nam, 2 modal, doi chieu khop/lech) + ghost-check 17/17 ham co dinh nghia. Gom 3.10.42-3.11.02. Rollback=3.10.41.
